articles.title: Raft of events including food festival, carnival, Proms in the Park and soapbox challenge announced by council
articles.summary: Hyndburn Council will support 23 events in 2026 promising activities for all the family spread across high streets and green spaces around the borough.

articles.title: Preston apartment block plan kicked out by council
articles.summary: A bid to build a new three-storey apartment block near Preston city centre has been rejected.

articles.title: Exhibition of ceramics, felting, silk painting and mosaics by arts and craft group Ground Up opens in Burnley's St James Street
articles.summary: A vibrant showcase of ceramics, felting, silk painting, banners and mosaic has gone on display in Burnley.

articles.title: Upcoming traffic changes set to begin in Burnley as improvement works start as part of £55m. Levelling Up investment

articles.title: Residents to be consulted on proposed plans for 3G football pitch and BMX race track at Nelson's Hodge House playing fields
articles.summary: Residents living close to playing fields in Nelson are to be asked for their views on proposals to create a 3G football pitch and BMX race track on the site.

articles.summary: Wednesday of this week marked World Cancer Day and Blackpool FC Community Trust is highlighting the vital support we provide to people affected by cancer across our local area.

articles.summary: Police are investigating reports that a man exposed himself to a teenage girl close to the Nelson-Burnley border.
